# STRAT.031 ? Getting to Yes (Fisher & Ury)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** negotiation_influence
**Domain:** NEGOTIATION_INFLUENCE
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Principled negotiation; separate people from problem; focus on interests not positions; generate options; objective criteria; BATNA

## Application
Distinguish relationship from substance; uncover interests; brainstorm mutual gains; use objective standards; know your BATNA; avoid positional

## Key Values
- Principled approach
- Interest focus
- Mutual gains
- Objective criteria
- BATNA awareness

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, negotiation_influence

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
